name: loom-spec
description: Key-free GENERATE-layer spec skills — expand a seed into a high-recall spec + critique omissions.

interface.shortDescription: Expand a sparse seed into a high-recall spec and critique its omissions
interface.longDescription: Key-free GENERATE-layer spec skills: spec-expansion fans a few lines of feature intent out into a high-recall spec draft — objects, states, paths, edge cases, and acceptance criteria in OpenSpec shape — and completeness-critic runs an adversarial panel hunting omissions (missing objects/actors, unhandled states, NFR gaps) before the spec is verified.
defaultPrompt: Expand this feature seed into a full spec.
Fan out the edge cases and acceptance criteria for this.
Critique this spec draft for missing requirements.
